description_long: This is a tall, cylindrical aluminum can with a dark, starry night sky design wrapping around its exterior. The label features large, bold white text with the word 'ASTRO COLA' and the word 'ORIGINAL' above it, along with a volume marking of 350 ml near the bottom. One side of the can displays a detailed nutritional information table in Portuguese, printed in a white box. The can has a standard pull tab closure on top, made of silver metal. The surface appears smooth and slightly glossy, with no visible condensation or dents. The overall appearance is sleek and modern, with a cosmic theme dominating the visual presentation.
description: A tall, sleek aluminum can with a starry night design, bold white text, and a nutritional label. The can features a smooth, glossy surface and a standard pull tab closure.
description_view_0: This view shows the nutritional information table in Portuguese prominently, with the starry background and part of the can's curvature visible.
description_view_1: The nutritional label is still visible but partially turned away, revealing more of the dark, star-filled design and the edge of the bold text.
description_view_2: The front label with large, bold white text 'ASTRO COLA' and 'ORIGINAL' is clearly visible against the cosmic background.
description_view_3: The can's front label is partially visible, showing 'TRO COLA', the 'ORIGINAL' text at the top, and the '350 ml' marking near the bottom.
attribute_graphic_design: The label features a dark, star-filled cosmic background with large, bold white typography and a clean, modern layout. Nutritional information is presented in a white box, and the overall design is sleek and visually striking.
